reviews.title: Great earbuds that fit well, sound good, and have long battery life!
reviews.text: The earbuds have pretty good sound and the main reason I love them is most earbuds don't fit well in my ears, but the ear fins make it snug and a good fit. They are fairly easy to connect to bluetooth devices. The case seems to hold a lot of battery and lasts a long time and I like that it charges with USB-C. The ear fins on the earbuds make it very snug and a good fit in my ears, and this also makes it noise cancelling. The case is a nice small size too. I've used it for almost a month and I have no complaints about them :)

reviews.title: Difficult to connect. Oddly LOW VOLUME and INTERFERES with apps like VIBER and DUO. Easy to loose.
reviews.text:
Where do I start:::
Connecting, if you want to use it with multiple devices, you can just forget it (if connected to one device, they will not allow you to connect to another device until you actually delete the connection from the current device even if it's off, did not have this issue with Apple Pods).
SOUND LEVEL is oddly LOW. Seriously, even at max setting does not even come close to even cheap plug-in buds, so can't use them in any loud place. Noise canceling does not help with that.
If used with call apps like Viber or Duo you'll be missing every other word. Don't know how or why, but connection signal goes to crap while these are on. As soon as I switch to plug-in buds, everything works just fine.
TOO DAMN SMALL. Sure it's convenient for the ear, but trying to handle them like putting in or taking out, better be sure to do it somewhere safe in case you drop them (not outside for sure). It would be better if they had over the year clips or something.
COLLECTS all your EAR-WAX. Yes, these things go in so deep that it just gets absolutely gross (never had this problem with other buds and I clean my ears every day)

title: 2 Pack iPhone Earbuds [Apple MFi Certified] Wired in-Ear Stereo Noise Canceling Isolating Lightning Headphones with Built-in Microphone&Volume Control Compatible with iPhone 13 12 SE 11 X 8 7-All iOS
description:
Using the Step
1.Quick and Easy Connection scheme one:After plugging in the headphones, a window will appear, click "Connect with iCloud" to use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets". 2.Connection scheme two: a.The first time you use it, you need to enter the iPhone settings and turn on Bluetooth. b.Bluetooth page: Find "Baets" in Other Devices, click "Baets" to connect(The headset will automatically connect to your device the next time, so you don’t need to do this step again.) Need Attention: It must be connected to Bluetooth for normal use. And it must always be connected to Bluetooth during use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets".
features: 【Widely Compatibility】: Compatible with all lightning connector devices.Headphone are widely compatible with iPhone 14/14 Pro/14 Pro Max/14 Mini/13/13 Pro/13 Pro Max/13 Mini/12 Mini/12 Pro Max/SE/11 Pro Max/11 Pro/XS Max/X/XR/8/8 Plus/7 Plus/7 Support All iOS Systems.Plug and Play!!!

【Apple MFi certified】: MFi-certified lightning headset, integrated improved C1 chip. Our wired headset offers you the most realistic sound quality with 2 holes that radiate 360° stereo, so you can better immerse yourself in world music during exercise and training environment.

【Mic & Volume Control 】: The headphone for iPhone built-in controller with a high-quality hands-free microphone. Music and Volume controller is designed to play/pause music, volume up/down, next & previous track, answer/end calls Wake up Siri. No need to take out the phone from your bags or pocket when performing these operations,emancipating your hands.

【Easy connection,two ways】:1.The first:After plugging in the headphones, a window will appear, click "Connect with iCloud" to use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets". 2.The second: a.The first time you use it,enter the iPhone settings and turn on Bluetooth. b.Bluetooth page: Find "Baets" in Other Devices, click "Baets" to connect(It will automatically connect to your device next time) Note: It must be connected to Bluetooth for normal use.

【Comfortable Wearing Experience】: The earphones for iPhone with ergonomic angular design and soft & premium ear tips, allow you to listen to the music for a long time without pain perception and keep a long sense of comfort during the wear. reviews.title: OK Headphones
reviews.text: I think these headphones are more like 3.5 stars but I rounded up.  I have kind of a small head for an adult female, and still these headphones were too tight.  Usually I can wear headphones made for kids but not these.  These are definitely for smaller heads and small ears since the ear cups get painful after a while since they aren't big enough to fully cover my ears.  The sound is o.k., nothing to write home about, but for the price (as of this review these head phones cost $19.44) I think they are worth it.  Great for kids, not so good for adults, even if you are a pinhead.

reviews.title: High quality headphones
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 4th grade child to use at school. It is hard to find headphones with plug-ins and that aren't wireless. For my son, the ones with a plug are best to use his school issued ipad. These are sturdy and I'm hoping they last the entire school year.

reviews.title: Not really for large heads.
reviews.text: All the talk about "classroom" and "child's" in the Amazon listing really means "this is a small headset." It's not big enough for me. I have a large (7 3/4) head and this thing actually hurts my ears (presses on them too hard). If you need headphones for a child then this would work just fine. Not for me.

reviews.title: Good headphones for kids
reviews.text: These are perfect for my 6 yr old. They fit her great and don’t get so loud that they can damage her ears.

reviews.title: They constantly fail
reviews.text:
The sound is good but they constantly fail to connect with my windows 10 laptop. When they do connect, it is usually just one of the earbuds and then it disconnects a short time later. I guess the battery life is okay but I've never been able to run them down as I get so frustrated with the connectivity issues.
The final straw was when I took them out for a jog for the fist time. One earbud failed and now will not power on. Is it due to moisture? I'll never know & I don't care. These are going in the trash.

reviews.title: [review for non ANC version] Pretty good deal for it's money
reviews.text:
I lost accurate track of time, but it was definitely more than 60hr of battery life. very impressive, a little scary to carry this much power on my head, but logically I understand that risks of catching fire or batteries exploding is negligible)

* sound quality - awesome (in terms of sound itself)
* build and material quality - impressive
* bluetooth connectivity - awesome. range, stability, reconnect speed, sound quality (in terms of losses via bluetooth while in varying range of "hotspot with music").
* battery quality - a little bit over a week of daily uses for 8hr+ a day. just perfect. That will be enough for a business trip out of town for a couple of days and back without need to recharge and sometimes even without prior notice to recharge before I go.
* distinct controls (bumps with space between them) - awesome. easy to use, easy to locate, no mistakes)
* folding capabilities - they do fold/unfold, but I tried it only once upon unpacking, but I rarely use this feature

The only minus that I can see in the last 20 days is how the headband is stretching when I'm wearing headphones. Looks dangerous (in terms of longevity). That's all I think. If this headphones will last more than a year I would call them perfect for a price and capabilities (tiny note about non ANC version and that's it)

So final score (while they last) 10/10

reviews.title: It is not passive soundproofing it is active. Which is NOT what I need.
reviews.text:
I have difficulty finding headphones with passive noise canceling for whatever reason and so I saw that this listing said passive and it was from the same brand as one I am still using. (It's breaking down due to age)

Active soundproofing is extremely detrimental to someone with audio disorders like myself since it makes a low buzzing noise that I can't tune out.

It does work as headphones but I would like to have it refunded so I can get another pair with the format of soundproofing I need.

title: USB C Hub, Baseus 6-in-1 Portable USB C Adapter for iPad Pro, Upgrade Type C Dongle to 4K HDMI, USB 3.0, SD/Micro SD Card Reader, 3.5mm Earphone Jack, Type C PD Charger, Independent Switch
description:
It easily extends the USB-C port of your laptop to 4K HDMI, 2 USB 3.0 Port, TF Card Reader, fast USB-C PD charging port and 3.5mm Headphone Jack. Plug & Play, with no additional drivers or installation necessary.
Features:
Turns a single USB-C connection into 6 ports (3.5mm Audio Jack, 2 USB 3.0, Micro SD, USB-C, HDMI) Take full advantage of iPadOS with the hub that supports both USB-C and USB-A flash/hard storage drives. Connect to USB-A peripherals via high speed USB 3.1 Gen 1 capable of 5Gb/s transfer speed. Use hub and charge iPad Pro at the same time! Also supports USB-C data. Simply connect with the HDMI port, mirrors your laptop's display (supports 4K at 30Hz ) on any HDMI-enabled device. Dual USB 3.0 ports, transmission rate up to 5Gbps, can transfer a high-definition movie in seconds. 3.5mm Audio and Mic 2 in 1 Port makes listening, talking, or recording a breeze. Built in TF slot for easy access to files from universal Micro SD Memory Card(SDXC: with high storage capacity up to 2TB)
Specification:
Material: Aluminum alloy Colour: Deep gray Input:Dual Type-C  Output: USB3.0*2+HDMI*1+PD*1+3.5mm*1+TF*1 USB3.0 transmission speed: 5Gbps HDMI Resolution: 4K@30Hz  PD input power: 100W Max.  TF Card: Supports data retrieval from 2TB Memory Card  3.5mm Audio Frequency Port: Port supports standard US headphone sets Size: 83*36*19mm Weight: 65g
Package List:
1* USB C Hub Adapter 1* User Manual
features: Creative Mobile Hub - The Newest Version 6-in-1 USB-C Hub instantly turns your iPad Pro and laptop USB-C port to a 4K HDMI port, 2 USB 3.0 Ports, a USB C charging port with power delivery, 3.5mm Audio/mic 2-in-1 jack (CTIA) and a TF card reader. Plug & Play, with no additional drivers or installation necessary. (NOTE: Only iPad Pro of iOS 13 or above is supported.)

Fast Charge & Data Transfer - The USB-C PD charging port supports pass-through charging of up to 60W, quickly charges iPad Pro while using the other ports, and can connect USB C flash drive for data transfer. USB 3.0 supports transfer speeds up to 5Gbps, fast enough to transfer and share images, files, and videos in seconds.

Crystal Clear 4K Resolution - Mirror or extend your screen with the USB C adapter’s HDMI port and directly stream 4K 3840*2160 @ 30Hz or Full HD 1080p video to HDTV, monitors, or projectors for a cinema-like visual feast. (Tips: Video output for 2018 iPad Pro is 2K@60HZ resolution). And the 3.5mm headphones Jack ensures you talk and listen to music at the same time, keep your focus on call or music.

Pad/Laptop Matching Design - Align the L-shaped holder against the corner of your pad or other USB-C devices, Baseus USB C hub can be securely attached. It is recommended not to wear a protective cover or other accessories that affect the thickness of the device. (such as magic keyboard)

Universal Compatibility Compatible with new iPad Pro 2020/2019/2018, MacBook Pro, MacBook Air 2019/2018, MacBook, Google Chromebook, Dell XPS 13 15, Lenovo Yoga 900, HP Spectre notebook, Surface Book 2, Google Pixel 3 XL/3, Samsung Galaxy Note 10/Note 9/S9/S8/Note 8/, Huawei Mate 30/20/M10/P30/P20, and more USB-C laptop/smartphone.

reviews.title: Don’t buy this knock off, get the real deal
reviews.text: This is the knock-off brand. The real version of this has an SD & micro SD card slot. This version also stopped working for me in under a month. I first noticed it wouldn’t regularly connect to my monitor via the HDMI port, then it began failing to connect all together. The power pass through on this is awful, charging takes forever, but it does with apples dongles also so whatever. Get the real deal & save 50 bucks

reviews.title: I wanted to love this,
reviews.text: I got this for my new iPad. It’s supposed to let you use wired headphones, SIM cards, and even hdmi.  And it does.  It’s a bit cumbersome to use but it does sit on the corner of my iPad even with the iPad cover on.  The big issue i have with it is that it does get hot, VERY HOT, while you’re using it for a longer period of time.  I don’t use it often due to that but i got it at a good price so I’ll keep it.

reviews.title: So far it works as advertised!  Gets alarmingly HOT.. concerned about longevity..
reviews.text:
update::: I've been having issues with connecting this hub to a capture device. it will constantly disconnect and reconnect. I purchased an hdmi splitter that has it's own power source (micro usb) and I connect it with the ipad and the capture device. It's like a middle man... and now the this hub stops disconnecting and reconnecting. It's very odd. Also, connecting power via the USB C port, on the hub, does not help. It's also not a heat issue because I bought a mini fan to blow on it and it's never hot. However, it doesn't disconnect and reconnect when directly connected to a monitor/tv.. it works fine then.

in addition to that issue, I had to get a replacement and noticed that both hubs displayed different color profiles. Using the same monitor, cables, ipad, etc. One was sort of washed out and one was very saturated. Also one wouldn't display 4k (only 2k) and the other one would display 4k, 2k, 1080p, etc. Not really sure why there would be so much variance with the same product.. I guess QC issues?

-----------------------------------

This is the "UPGRADED" version.

So far it works as advertised! Gets alarmingly HOT.. concerned about longevity of the hub itself and concerned about potential damage this could do to my iPad...

This product advertises "Heat vents" but they're just cutouts for the ipad's speakers.. it doesn't actually vent the inside of the hub. This seems deceptive.

I've tried those $20-30 cheap usb c to hdmi + charging port options and they all didn't work properly... mostly they wouldn't actually charge the ipad while outputting the HDMI signal.
This device actually DOES charge while outputting the HDMI signal properly.. which is great.
The audio port works fine, but I have not used the USB ports as I don't really have any use for them at the moment. I mostly needed hdmi output and a charging port that actually charged while hdmi was being used.

I love how the company included 3 different sized spacers to accommodate for ipad's with cases.

The switch to disable the hub is a nice feature. BUT I wish you could disable the charging while still being able to use the HDMI out... so if this switch instead only disabled the charging capabilities but still retained the ability to output video/audio via the HDMI output, that would be, imo, better. Then when the ipad's own battery gets low.. I could flip the switch and allow the hub to start charging. Obviously I can just unplug the USB C charging cable from the hub, but it would be a QoL feature to not have to do that.

I like how it has a long-ish cable instead of just having the usb port extend out of the actual hub body.. this makes it much more versatile, imo.

My biggest concern is how long this product will last due to how HOT it gets while using the HDMI out and charging the ipad at the same time. This is the only time the hub gets alarmingly HOT.. when one is using the HDMI out AND charging at the same time. One could argue that because it's so hot to the touch, that means the passive cooling, inside the hub, is doing its job.. but I don't know if that's actually the case w/o seeing the internals and seeing what kind of heatsinks or w/e are being used. All I know is that this hub gets VERY VERY HOT and devices that overheat tend to stop working sooner than later.

Overall I think this is one of the better options available for 30-50$. The versatility of attaching to the ipad or have it hanging is a huge plus for me.

reviews.title: Convenient & Useful iPad adapter
reviews.text:
So far the only bummer is it’s not really screen protector friendly. I used the thinnest insert because without one it won’t stay in place.

It’s a bit too snug to put on an iPad 11 with a screen protector. The edge of the protector kinda bubbles up. I’ll have to try a few thin cases and not use the inserts to this adapter. That would be more beneficial anyways.

One thing I did notice about the charging port is it’s a bit loose. So you may need to get new cables or try different brands. I have several brands/styles and some do better than others. The Apple cables seem to fit fairly snug though.

Other than that it works as stated. I do like it and it’s more low profile compared to others. All of the ports work especially for charging multiple devices. I use 30w+ for my iPad because I tend to use adapters often. 30w brick & adapter loaded still charged iPad under use.

The adapter looks nice as well. A bit thick but not to the point it’s an issue using it. I have the model with the on/off switch. That’s convenient while otg, in case you need to cut power from the adapter to save the battery from draining.

The adapter doesn’t seem to take a ton of power but if you don’t need it on while away from a power source I’d say just flip it off.

Overall I like this adapter it’s nice & convenient. Like I said my biggest gripe was not really screen protector friendly (iPad w/out a case only screen protector) but it’s not a deal breaker. I’d recommend trying this out!

reviews.title: Just What I Wanted
reviews.text: I wanted to replace my old clunker of a boom box.  I needed a small CD player with_ a speaker so I wouldn't have to wear ear buds.  That's what I found here. At first, I wondered about the sound, but considering how small it is, the sound is fine.  I'm glad to have easier access to my CD collection.

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth CD player
reviews.text:
I have a few CDs that I have kept despite mostly using streaming services. Music not available online. This device allows me to hear them again.
Connected very easy to my Bluetooth tailgate speaker.

Don't plan on using the built in speaker as I have several better speakers that I can connect to with cable or Bluetooth.

reviews.title: Sound Quality not the best on its own speakers
reviews.text:
I found using the Aux cable along with my Bluetooth headphones the sound quality is much better.
The headphones that came with unit wasn't that good.

reviews.title: Very Good Portable CD Player With Plenty of Options
reviews.text:
With the onset of Pandora, satellite radio and many other such options, I found I wasn’t playing my CDs anymore. In fact, I couldn’t find my CD player! And the high-end system in my truck doesn’t even have a CD option. So when I saw this I figured I give it a try. I like that it’s portable and plays without skipping even when bumped, running with it, or the dog knocking it off of the table. It can be used with my several different sets of earphones. It also plugs into my truck stereo without a problem.

I also wanted it to play through its own speaker while in my crafts room. This is where the 5th star gets removed. When turning it up nearly all the way the speaker starts to buzz on certain notes. It isn’t loud at all on its own either so using it without auxiliary speakers is not good if more than about 8 feet from it. However, I am playing my CDs which I have not heard in years, and that makes me very happy.

reviews.title: Fun and good
reviews.text:
My 13 yo son is on the vintage wave, so he has been using this and the cassette one. He is happy!
Very portable, small size.
The sound is ok.
Has been using it non stop and still working good.
Would be a fun gift for someone who likes old school (on a fun way, not like a collector)
We like it.

reviews.title: So far! Its great
reviews.text: Cover fit nice and snug. Easy to install. So far its been great! Good product. Does what it says

reviews.title: Cute and durable
reviews.text: This case does it's intended job of protecting my Airpods from drops and dings. The lavender is nice and subtle. The case is a good quality case, easy to put on, and stays in place.

reviews.title: Even more in love with Elago products now
reviews.text:
OMG! The finish on this case is so soft I can't stop touching it! ... Good touch, not bad touch.
I've been super impressed with everything I've bought from Elago since I discovered them and they are my go-to brand for phone cases. I saw this Airpod case listed for a very reasonable price and being Elago I didn't really think twice when selecting it. I was not disappointed!
Great fit and manufacture. And the finish on the silicone is easily the softest and most even I've even seen/felt. It's so soft. I find myself mindlessly picking it up while sitting at my computer and running my fingers over the surface turning it in my hand because it feels so nice. Elago knocked it out of the park again.

reviews.title: The cover does not allow wireless charging.
reviews.text: The cover does not allow wireless charging.

reviews.title: Decent
reviews.text: It's a decent case it's for sure protective. But be warned that the silicon with getting a different feel and the matte texture. It will become shiny over time after maybe a few months

reviews.title: Fits HDJ X5 but not very comfortable
reviews.text: It absolutely works, but the extra thickness does not provide extra support around ears. The foam is way too soft and it is being squished too much to be supportive and my ears are always touching the mesh inside the earpads. Plus, it is heating up more than the stock earpads.

title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

reviews.title: Nice headphone set
reviews.text: This is an excellent headphone set. I am hard of hearing and watch tv late at night, often the volume is too high and I disturb my family’s sleep, this set solves the problem, now I can hear the tv and they get a sound night’s sleep!. The ear pieces fit comfortably and great sound quality. I like that they are wireless and comfortable to wear.

reviews.title: Exactly as described, Quality product! Solid design!
reviews.text: Exactly as described, Quality product! Solid design!
